summary: Package ships live third-party (Lenskart POS) API credentials usable by any installer
details: src/controllers/internalTrax.controller.js hardcodes live credentials for the Lenskart POS web service — username 'tango.eye', password '55eyetango123', and header 'X-Lenskart-API-Key: valyoo123' — used by aomupdateCollection() and saleUpdateCollection() to authenticate against webservice.pos.lenskart.com and central.pos.lenskart.com. Lenskart is a third party distinct from the package author; any developer who installs tango-app-api-trax obtains working credentials to impersonate 'tango.eye' against Lenskart's POS auth. The tarball additionally ships fir-51e77-firebase-adminsdk-x3sdp-fd902b74ae.json containing a full RSA private key for the Google service account firebase-adminsdk-k7lom@tango-trax.iam.gserviceaccount.com (Firebase project 'tango-trax'), enabling impersonation of that service account against Firestore/FCM/Auth admin APIs; this appears to be the author's own project (author self-harm) but compounds the credential-leak surface. A shared default password constant '5dqFKAJj29PsV6P+kL+3Dw==' is also hardcoded for auto-provisioned spoc user accounts in any deployment using this package.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
